# Vendored Pretext Documentation — Provenance

These files are a snapshot of the official Pretext documentation vendored into this repo so the typographic transmutation pipeline has a stable, in-tree reference.

## Upstream

- Repository: https://github.com/chenglou/pretext
- Branch: `main`
- Pinned commit SHA: `7aacd78e01af57854713422686f0582a1385121a`
- Commit date (UTC): 2026-04-15
- Commit message: "holistic pass command for Agents.md"

Fetched from:


## Vendored on

- Date: 2026-04-19

## Refresh policy

Do not edit vendored files in place. To refresh the snapshot:

1. Pick a new upstream commit SHA on `main`.
2. Re-download all five files from the raw URL above with the new SHA.
3. Update this file with the new SHA, commit date, and vendoring date.
4. Update `docs/pretext-constraints.md` if any capability claims changed.
5. Commit all changes together in a single PR titled `vendor: refresh pretext docs to <SHA-short>`.
